title: CachingStore: no upper bound on cache size
description: secretx-cache/src/lib.rs stores cache entries in an unbounded HashMap. A caller that iterates over many distinct secret names (or an attacker who can control secret names) will grow the cache without limit until OOM. Trigger: long-running process fetching secrets with many distinct names, or any loop where name varies. Should cap at a configurable max_entries (e.g. 1024) with LRU or FIFO eviction.
